metadata.description: Official Decodo agent skills for web scraping, search, e-commerce/SERP/social data, and price monitoring.

plugins.name: decodo
plugins.description: Web scraping and structured data extraction powered by Decodo. Bundles skills for fetching web data (scrape, Google/Bing search, Amazon/Walmart/Target e-commerce, Reddit/TikTok/YouTube social) via the Decodo CLI, hosted MCP server, or raw API, plus a price-monitoring workflow (current price, cheapest seller, track prices over time and detect drops). Handles JavaScript rendering, anti-bot/CAPTCHA, proxy rotation, and geo-targeting.
